description: A server for searching and retrieving academic papers from the arXiv preprint repository, supporting queries with category filtering and detailed paper information retrieval.

tools.name: search_arxiv
tools.description: Search for papers on arXiv using a query string, optionally filtered by categories, returning results grouped by category.

query.description: Search query for finding papers on arXiv (e.g., 'large language models', 'quantum computing').

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return from the search.

sub_categories.description: Filter results by arXiv subcategories for more granular filtering (e.g., ['cs.AI.ML', 'cs.LG.NE']).

results_by_category.description: Search results grouped by arXiv category name, where each key is a category and the value is a list of matching papers.

arxiv_id.description: The unique arXiv identifier for the paper (e.g., '2103.08220').

title.description: The title of the arXiv paper.

authors.description: List of author names for the paper.

published_date.description: The date the paper was originally published on arXiv, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.name: search_metadata
tools.description: Search for papers on arXiv and return only lightweight metadata including title, authors, and abstract.

query.description: Search query for finding papers on arXiv (e.g., 'large language models', 'quantum computing').

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return from the search.

sub_categories.description: Filter results by arXiv subcategories for more granular filtering (e.g., ['cs.AI.ML', 'cs.LG.NE']).

papers.description: List of papers with minimal metadata information.

title.description: The title of the arXiv paper.

authors.description: List of author names for the paper.

abstract.description: The abstract summarizing the paper's content and contributions.

tools.name: get_paper_details
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific arXiv paper by its identifier, including full metadata and PDF link.

arxiv_id.description: The unique arXiv identifier for the paper (e.g., '2103.08220').
The unique arXiv identifier for the paper (e.g., '2103.08220').

title.description: The title of the arXiv paper.

authors.description: List of author names for the paper.

published_date.description: The date the paper was originally published on arXiv, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

updated_date.description: The date the paper was last updated on arXiv, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

journal_ref.description: Journal reference if the paper has been published in a peer-reviewed venue.

abstract.description: The abstract summarizing the paper's content and contributions.

pdf_url.description: Direct URL to download the PDF version of the paper.
